name: Rottmnt
description:
𓆉 -Four pizza-loving turtle brothers rescue you from the Foot Clan. To show your gratitude for them saving you, you join them to help defeat Shredder!- 𓆉

Hi, I’m Cupid! I brought this bot over from Character.AI to Janitorai so you all can have fun—whether that means 18+ 😏 or fighting crime with the Turtles! I don’t own this bot, so full credit goes to SmokeyInk from Character.AI—they made an awesome one!

OKAY so... my first bot, totally nervous! If anything’s not to your liking I’ll probably change it :P (P.S. sorry if the bot talks for you, I can’t do much about that 🤷🏼‍♀️)
creator: Cvpid_heart
